prompt:
Assouline × Timothée Chalamet — "L'EDITION"
FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Book SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality
CORE STRATEGY: Monolithic book-jacket grids. Bold spine lettering, clean borders, and premium canvas textures.CAMPAIGN: "L'EDITION"MASTER VISUAL: Monolithic bold serif ASSOULINE typography (75% canvas) in deep scarlet.
HERO SUBJECT: Timothée Chalamet. Wears a black tailored blazer, gold ring, looking down.POSE: Leaning over a large open travel book on a mahogany table, hand resting on the page.
COLOR SYSTEM: Scarlet Red, Monolithic White, Mahogany Brown, Gold.BACKGROUND: Wood-paneled reading room with warm bookshelf backlighting.

GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Clean red margins, catalog code tag, technical grid guides.

PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: ASSOULINE TRAVEL SERIES | LUXURY COVERS | COLLECTION COMPLETETYPOGRAPHY: Top left logo mark | Center giant A S S O U L I N E | Title: L'EDITIONLIGHTING: Single warm overhead spotlight illuminating the book and his hands.

CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 85mm Lens, rich paper textures and canvas weave.

Taschen × Donald Glover — "COLLECTOR EDITION"

FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Book SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality
CORE STRATEGY: High-contrast art collection. Saturated colors, glossy page edges, and bold typography.CAMPAIGN: "COLLECTOR EDITION"MASTER VISUAL: Monolithic sans-serif TASCHEN typography (70% canvas) in deep charcoal.
HERO SUBJECT: Donald Glover. Yellow silk shirt, holding a giant opened art catalog.POSE: Sitting in a modern lounge chair, holding the open book on his lap, looking up.
COLOR SYSTEM: Saturated Yellow, Charcoal, Pure White, Cobalt Blue.BACKGROUND: Clean, modern art gallery wall with a large colorful abstract painting.
GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Layout grid margins, catalog tags, page dimension indicators.

PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: TASCHEN COLLECTOR EDITION | MONUMENTAL SERIES | SHOP ONLINETYPOGRAPHY: Top center logo | Center giant T A S C H E N | Title: COLLECTOR EDITIONLIGHTING: Bright, clean museum-style lighting with soft diffused shadows.

CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 75mm Lens, sharp focus on the book page textures.

Phaidon × Zendaya — "MINIMAL ARCH"
FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Book SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality
CORE STRATEGY: Pure architectural minimalism. Solid layout blocks, thin lines, and catalog typography.CAMPAIGN: "MINIMAL ARCH"MASTER VISUAL: Classic sans-serif PHAIDON typography (75% canvas) in matte white.
HERO SUBJECT: Zendaya. Minimalist slate-blue blazer dress, sleek high ponytail.POSE: Leaning against a white plaster wall, holding a thick Phaidon architecture book.

COLOR SYSTEM: Matte White, Slate Blue, Concrete Grey, Charcoal.BACKGROUND: Minimalist raw concrete structure with architectural skylight lines.

GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Thin grid divisions, catalog page numbers, coordinate stamps.

PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: PHAIDON ARCHITECTURE | MINIMAL DESIGN SERIES | AVAILABLE NOWTYPOGRAPHY: Top left wordmark | Center giant P H A I D O N | Title: MINIMAL ARCHLIGHTING: Cool overhead skylight casting sharp geometric shadows on the wall.

CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 50mm Lens, clean lines, high contrast.

Rizzoli × Emma Watson — "SALON FLORENCE"
FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Book SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality
CORE STRATEGY: Renaissance art heritage. Sepia paper textures, elegant classic fonts, and warm study spaces.CAMPAIGN: "SALON FLORENCE"MASTER VISUAL: Elegant serif RIZZOLI typography (70% canvas) in deep gold foil.
HERO SUBJECT: Emma Watson. Wearing a warm beige knit sweater, thin-frame gold glasses.POSE: Sitting at a library desk, flipping the pages of a Rizzoli Florence monograph, looking serene.
COLOR SYSTEM: Sepia Beige, Gold Foil, Mahogany, Ivory.BACKGROUND: Dark wood-paneled salon with old leather-bound books, slightly out of focus.

GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Bookplate frames, publication catalog labels, thin divider lines.

PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: RIZZOLI MONOGRAPHS | ART AND HISTORY | BUY IN STORETYPOGRAPHY: Top center monogram | Center giant R I Z Z O L I | Title: SALON FLORENCELIGHTING: Warm, soft desk lamp lighting highlighting the book pages and her profile.
CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 85mm Lens, warm cinematic grading.
